name: Claude Optional Integration
features_completed: claude.service.ts — full Claude call pipeline (consent → quota → decrypt → callAI → logUsage → logAudit → fallback)
callClaudeForChat() — routes to Anthropic API with encrypted key, falls back to Reno Brain on any failure
getClaudeAvailability() — checks consent + config + API key presence in one call
getClaudeUsageStats() — aggregated token/cost stats from AiUsageLog by provider='anthropic'
fallbackToRenoBrain() — silent fallback to provider='mock', sets isFallback=true with reason
chat.routes.ts updated — provider='reno_brain'|'claude' routing, full message objects returned, providerBadge on response
Claude path logs its own usage via logUsage(); Reno Brain path logs its own — no double-logging
Claude usage tracked under provider='anthropic' in AiUsageLog with cost estimation ($3/$15 per 1M tokens)
Provider badge returned on every chat response: { slug, name, model, isFallback, fallbackReason? }
GET /admin/ai/claude/availability — real-time Claude readiness check for tenant
GET /admin/ai/claude/usage — token usage, cost, daily stats, model breakdown
GET /admin/ai/status — now includes claudeAvailability
Brain chat UI updated — provider selector dropdown (Reno Brain / Claude)
UI shows Claude option only when availability=true (consent + config + key all verified)
Provider badge chip displayed on every assistant message bubble
Fallback notice shown inline when isFallback=true with fallbackReason text
Send button and header badge change color/icon for Claude vs Reno Brain
Warning banner displayed when Claude is selected: data sent to external service
Link to /settings/ai-providers in provider dropdown when Claude is not yet enabled
TypeScript API: 0 errors | TypeScript Web: 0 errors
security_checks: PASS: Claude is never active without explicit tenant consent (TenantAiConsent.consentGiven=true AND revokedAt=null)
PASS: Claude is never the default — provider='reno_brain' is default in all chat requests
PASS: API key decrypted in-memory only, never logged, never returned to client
PASS: Claude usage counts against the same tenant aiMonthlyTokenQuota as Reno Brain
PASS: Fallback to Reno Brain on: no consent / no config / no key / API error / quota exceeded
PASS: Every Claude call logged to AiProviderAuditLog (action='call', status='success'|'error'|'blocked')
PASS: Usage logged to AiUsageLog with provider='anthropic', model, tokens, cost, latencyMs
PASS: Frontend warning displayed whenever Claude provider is selected
PASS: providerBadge on every response — tenant always knows which AI answered
PASS: fallback is transparent — isFallback=true and fallbackReason shown to user in UI
fallback_chain: 1. Consent not given or revoked → fallback to Reno Brain immediately
2. BrainProviderConfig not found for provider='anthropic' → fallback
3. API key missing (no encryptedApiKey and no apiKey) → fallback
4. Decryption failure → log audit error → fallback
5. Monthly quota exceeded → log audit blocked → fallback
6. Claude API call throws → log audit error → fallback if fallbackEnabled=true, else rethrow
api_endpoints: POST /api/v1/brain/chat — updated: accepts provider='reno_brain'|'claude', routes accordingly
GET /api/v1/admin/ai/claude/availability — check if Claude is ready for this tenant

golden_rules_compliance.doNotReplaceRenoBrain: PASS — Reno Brain is still the default; provider.ts unchanged; mock path untouched
golden_rules_compliance.claudeMustBeOptional: PASS — user must explicitly select 'claude' in the dropdown; default remains 'reno_brain'
golden_rules_compliance.externalProviderDisabledByDefault: PASS — provider selector defaults to 'reno_brain' on every new conversation
golden_rules_compliance.tenantAdminMustExplicitlyEnable: PASS — consent + BrainProviderConfig + encryptedApiKey all required before Claude is usable
golden_rules_compliance.doNotCrash: PASS — every Claude failure falls back to Reno Brain silently; no unhandled rejections
golden_rules_compliance.doNotExposeApiKeys: PASS — key decrypted in memory, never returned in any response, masked hint only in config endpoints
golden_rules_compliance.doNotSendDataWithoutConsent: PASS — consent check is the first gate in callClaudeForChat(); no data sent if consent missing
golden_rules_compliance.respectRBAC: PASS — all endpoints behind standard tenant auth middleware
golden_rules_compliance.criticalActionsRequireApproval: PASS — no auto-actions; AI responses are informational only
golden_rules_compliance.allActionsAudited: PASS — every Claude call (success, error, blocked, fallback) written to AiProviderAuditLog

next_phase: Phase 33 — Claude Tool Calling for Reno
stop_and_wait: Do not begin Phase 33 until this Phase 32 report is reviewed and approved.
